title: Charge case inside screen/forth screen, right zoom in/out
scenario: Quick Start Guide charge case inside screen zoom in/out toggle fails when clicking the right circle button
steps: Open the Poly Studio Mobile app.
Tap on the Quick Start Guide (QSG) option.
Swipe or navigate to the fourth screen showing the charge case inside.
Tap the right circle button on the screen.
Tap the right circle button again.
expected: First tap: The screen zooms in and displays new text related to the charge case inside. Second tap: The screen zooms out to the original view showing the charge case inside.
